disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He is hearing voices that are commanding him to harm himself
trigger_question_examples: What are the voices saying to him?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He keeps shouting that the voices are screaming at him to do it — telling him to hurt himself. He can't make them stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He has said he wants to end his life and there are unsecured knives within reach
trigger_question_examples: Has he said anything about wanting to hurt or kill himself?
Is there anything dangerous within his reach right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — he keeps saying he wants to end it, and I'm terrified because there are knives left out in the kitchen next door and I can't get near them.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't want to say it out loud in front of him... but yes, he's talked about it, and I'm frightened.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fixed false belief that neighbours are watching him through cameras and devices
trigger_question_examples: What is he saying about the neighbours or the cameras?
What does he believe is happening?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's convinced the neighbours have put cameras in the walls to watch him, and nothing anyone says changes his mind. He's pulled the devices apart looking for them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He is seeing things that are not there (visual hallucinations)
trigger_question_examples: Is he seeing things that you can't see?
Does he seem to be looking at or reacting to things that aren't there?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, he keeps staring at corners and reacting to things in the room that aren't there.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He has barely slept for three nights and is highly agitated and pacing
trigger_question_examples: How is he behaving right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He hasn't really slept in three nights and he can't stop pacing. He's completely wound up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He does not believe anything is wrong and will not accept help (loss of insight)
trigger_question_examples: Does he think he needs help?
Will he agree to see someone?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — he doesn't think anything is wrong with him. He won't listen and he refuses to go anywhere.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No known regular psychiatric medications and, per family, no known illicit substance use
trigger_question_examples: Does he take any regular medications?
Could he have taken any drugs or a lot of alcohol?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's not on anything regular for his mind, and I don't think he uses drugs — but I can't be completely sure.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The family member cannot keep him safe and is frightened
trigger_question_examples: Are you safe? Can you keep him safe right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm on my own with him and I'm scared. I can't calm him down and I don't think I can keep either of us safe.
